payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark brown leather three-seat reclining couch with segmented, heavily padded cushions and visible stitched seams and creasing; right-side arm/edge is slightly cut off by the image border, and the couch appears close to the camera (approximately 1.5 meters away).
